groups.label: expanding
groups.description: Paper-protocol expanding context, aquarium_then_vehicle direction, random ordering #5.

sentences.text: The aquarist introduced live coral fragments into the reef tank during the scheduled maintenance session.

The aquarist introduced live coral fragments into the reef tank during the scheduled maintenance session. She spent the afternoon rearranging the gravel and driftwood decorations inside her freshwater tank.
